profile.name: Ranko Janković
profile.headline: Lead Software Developer
profile.summary: 20+ years of experience developing software centered around Microsoft technologies

experience.title: Lead Software Developer
experience.summary: Developing custom APIs and applications for various clients, including media playback systems and financial software.
achievements: Custom API and JS component for displaying stream metadata on radio station website using GO and jQuery.
Rewrite of ASP.NET Web Forms application as GO API.
E-invoicing and electronic fiscalization API implementation on legacy software.

experience.title: Technical Lead
experience.summary: Led technical direction and architecture for multiple platform development projects.
achievements: Gathered client requirements and designed solution architecture for Wild Immersion media catalog.
Tech lead duties for platform modernization and team management.
Mentored senior engineers on architecture best practices.

experience.title: Senior Software Developer
experience.summary: Key member of team working on major platform migration and modernization projects, contributing to architecture design and feature implementation.
achievements: Significantly contributed to re-write of EkhartYoga platform, migrating from PHP to .NET Core. Re-designed key components including subscription pricing, recurring memberships, and payment processing microservice.
Contributed to design and early rewrite phase of Pimalion migration from PHP to .NET.
Developed API for Regulatory Information Management (RIM) software for Acuta.

experience.title: Senior Software Developer
experience.summary: Developed comprehensive financial research product workflow management software platform and toolset.
achievements: Played central role in developing .NET ASP MVC Web App for RPAS platform.
Developed classic ASP web application components.
Implemented AWS Elasticsearch Research library and Microsoft VSTO Word Add-In.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.summary: Designed and developed database systems and software for online supermarket operations including inventory management and POS.
achievements: Designed and developed database for on-line supermarket using MySQL.
Developed multi-purpose Windows service for parsing text files to update product information and download orders using VB.NET, MySQL and MS Access.
Developed order processing and POS software using MS Access, and financial accounting and inventory management software.

experience.title: Independent Software Developer
experience.summary: Provided comprehensive software development and IT consulting services to over 30 clients, developing specialized business applications.
achievements: Developed financial accounting, inventory management and POS software using MS Access and MS SQL Server, deployed across 15+ companies in Montenegro.
Developed parliament activity tracking software and maintained databases for MANS NGO.
Developed specialized applications for expense tracking, material tracking and fleet management for construction company.
Developed web applications for advertising media tracking and college disability support search for USA-based clients using ASP and MS SQL Server.
Developed web applications using Joomla, CMSimple and WordPress.

experience.title: Lead Software Developer
experience.summary: Developed and maintained in-house business software and specialized applications for transport and payment systems.
achievements: Developed and expanded in-house business software using MS Access and MS SQL Server 2000.
Developed transport planning and tracking software using MS Visual C++ 6.0 and MS SQL Server 2000.
Developed outgoing payment management software using MS Visual C++ 6.0 and MS SQL Server 2000.

experience.title: Volunteer Tech Consultant
experience.summary: Continuous technical consulting and maintenance for student radio station infrastructure.
achievements: Continually providing technical consulting for student radio station.
Developed and maintaining radio station website with online streaming based on IceCast server.
